task_completion.description: Load the input countries shapefile into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' is visible in the Layers panel or the map canvas displays the global country boundaries.

task_completion.description: Open the tool to convert multipart geometries to singlepart geometries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A geoprocessing dialog box titled 'Multipart to singleparts' (or equivalent geometry conversion tool) is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Run the multipart to singleparts conversion tool successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (often named 'Singleparts') appears in the Layers panel, or a success message/log indicates the algorithm finished executing.

task_completion.description: Open the export dialog for the newly created singlepart layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' or 'Export Layer' dialog box is open, specifically targeting the new singlepart layer.

task_completion.description: Configure the export settings to save as a GeoJSON file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the export dialog, the Format dropdown is set to 'GeoJSON' and the File name/path field exactly matches '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_singlepart.geojson'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS software's graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GIS software menus, panels, and dialogs (e.g., QGIS), rather than just typing GDAL/Python commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the geometry conversion tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Multipart to singleparts' dialog is seen being configured and run, rather than the agent just renaming the original file or mocking the output.

integrity.description: The agent exported the converted singlepart layer, not the original input layer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog shows the source layer is the newly generated 'Singleparts' layer, not 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input shapefile is located at '/home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp'. The expected output must be saved to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_singlepart.geojson'. A correct conversion will explode the original 177 MultiPolygon features into exactly 289 single-part Polygon features. The final geometry type must be 'Polygon'.
